title: When Breath Becomes Air
author: Paul Kalanithi
description: A neurosurgeon's memoir written as he faced terminal lung cancer, exploring what makes a life worth living and the meaning of a life in medicine.
sample_text: I flipped through the CT scan images, the diagnosis obvious: the lungs were matted with innumerable tumors, the spine deformed, a full lobe of the liver obliterated.
